text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
"Scandal at Tracen?! Not So Elite Now: Are Students Lacking
Discipline?"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait, wait, WHAAAAT?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
"The Bottomless Pit Claims Neighborhood Restaurant as Next Victim!"
"Terrifying Ghostly Streaks Revealed to be High-Speed Umamusume!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is the third time this month! But now it's personal—what do they
mean we're "lacking discipline?!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With more and more eyes on the Umamusume racing scene, we've had
an influx of tabloids trying to capitalize on the boom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy increased campus security and issued a warning to
all students, so we haven't had any real problems... Though that
hasn't stopped the media.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The stuff they're complaining about was just a misunderstanding, but still... As the one leading the disciplinary committee, maybe I am too lax.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We can't have that! I'm gonna double down on my disciplinary duties
and keep Tracen safe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm the chair, so it's my responsibility to fight off those vile tabloid
villains! And fight I will!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You there! You're two seconds late to campus! That'd be a huge time
loss on the track, so speed it up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You there! Your skirt's a millimeter too short!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
YOU THERE! Stay on your half of the court! You can't steal the other
team's space just 'cause they're on break!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Argh, it's almost curfew! There's so many issues on campus, and so
little time to solve them!
choice_data_list:
Maybe you could let some of the small things
slide...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nope, those small violations lead to bigger ones! I'll have to nip them
all in the bud tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hang on. Why are those two leaving the dorm this late? That's dangerous, and it could lead to a real scandal! We've gotta catch them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You there! This arcade excursion violates the Tracen Academy
disciplinary code! Curfew applies to senior division too!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Yikes, the disciplinary chair?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now let's hurry and get back to the dorm! If you've got time to waste
on delinquency, you've got time to work on your racing!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Like I don't work enough already! It's always work, work, work... You
sound just like my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: I have to run from dawn to dusk, and then they pile up ridiculous amounts of exercises to do on my days off... Is it such a crime to take a break?!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
And then we've got the disciplinary committee nitpicking every stupid
little thing... Being at Tracen is suffocating!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Su-suffocating?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But... that's no excuse to violate the rules! It doesn't matter what the
problem is—delinquency isn't the answer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's my job to protect the rules.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now c'mon, we're leaving! As chair of the disciplinary committee, I
can't let students stay out this late!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Thanks for the help. I'm so sorry to have kept you past
curfew...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... I upheld the disciplinary code like I'm supposed to, but...
something about that exchange felt wrong...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The stuff she said keeps echoing through my head. I know it's no
excuse to be off-campus at night, but...
choice_data_list:
I think... if nothing else, you could have been
more sympathetic.

I think... if nothing else, you could have been
more sympathetic.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sympathetic...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: I have to run from dawn to dusk, and then they pile up ridiculous amounts of exercises to do on my days off... Is it such a crime to take a break?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I've been shouting at people without hearing their side of the
story. Both tonight... and earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now she's on track. I know Bamboo believes that the rules are "good,"
but that doesn't mean rule-breakers are inherently "bad."
choice_data_list: Next time, let's try talking things over first.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Talk first, huh? ...You're right! On behalf of the committee, I'll try to
encourage reform before demanding it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad you're here, Trainer! I never know what I'm doing, but
you're always so mature.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Uraaaaah! I swear to you, I'll work hard to keep learning and growing!
